name: Hoax.ai Controlled Public Reference Pilot Policy
governing_principle: A controlled public reference page teaches the language. It does not operate the engine.
category_language_principle: The first public routes must make Hoax.ai's category legible before any public classifier exists.
metadata_policy: Controlled title, description, canonical, robots, OG, and WebPage JSON-LD only. No Product, SoftwareApplication, Service, FactCheck, ClaimReview, or tool-implying schema.
structured_data_policy: WebPage JSON-LD allowed when bounded and non-tool-implying. No product, service, software, detector, or API schema.
route_policy: Exactly two new controlled public reference routes in route-registry. No classifier, tool, upload, or scoring routes.
sitemap_policy: Exactly two new public reference URLs added to sitemap.xml alongside homepage.
homepage_link_policy: Homepage may link only to the two pilot reference pages in a controlled reference section. No tool, upload, classifier, or scoring CTAs.
